title: AGENTS.md operator quickstart synthesis packet benchmark cross-link v0
problem: README Operator Quickstart now documents synthesis packet benchmark dry-run (ticket-379), but AGENTS.md Operator Loop section does not cross-link the benchmark workflow, artifact path, or synthesis_packet_benchmark_status fields.
acceptance_criteria: AGENTS.md Operator Loop section links to README synthesis packet benchmark workflow.
AGENTS.md notes synthesis_packet_benchmark_status and reports_per_hour_estimate without duplicating full command block.
No CLI or export code changes.
